description: Charming flat comic illustration style (dev, high quality)

model._hint: Transformer: city96/FLUX.1-dev-gguf (flux1-dev-Q8_0.gguf, ~12 GB). Pipeline components: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev (gated — HF token required). LoRA: fffiloni/cute-comic-800 (cute-comic-800.safetensors). Q8_0 keeps near-bfloat16 quality with trivial dequantisation overhead on MPS. sequential_cpu_offload disabled (incompatible with GGUF). LoRA applied via set_adapters() (unfused — required for GGUF).

lora._hint: 0.9 default. Range: 0.7–1.0. Lower values blend LoRA style with base FLUX aesthetics. With dev's stronger guidance, lower strengths (0.7–0.8) can produce more refined blends.

generation._hint: 20 steps recommended. Range: 10–40. Dev with CFG (3.5) — more steps noticeably improve fine illustration detail compared to schnell. Do not set cfg_scale to 0.0.

system._hint: ~12 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (incompatible with GGUF)

notes.about: Generates warm, flat children's-book-style comic illustrations — bold outlines, simplified shapes, cheerful characters, and soft pastel tones. Uses FLUX.1-dev for higher detail and coherence than the schnell variant. Well-suited for greeting cards, story illustrations, and character portraits.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: append 'in the style of TOK' to every prompt — without it the LoRA style barely activates. Examples: 'a brave knight in the style of TOK', 'two children playing in a garden in the style of TOK', 'a cozy winter cabin in the style of TOK'.
notes.warnings: FLUX.1-dev is a gated model — a HuggingFace token with access to black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev is required.
